introduction:
The Transport Department of West Bengal has extensively refined driving permit procedures by establishing a clear two-step roadmap: obtain a Learner's Licence (LL) before qualifying for a Permanent Driving Licence (DL).

West Bengal operates actively through the Vahan and Sarathi systems promoting quick and transparent scheduling.
quickFacts:
Crucial Path
  • LL Test Phase: Computer-based test is frequently handled online using Aadhaar OR in conventional computer labs at the RTO.
  • DL Test Phase: Wait 30 days. Mandatory skill validation at the WB MVI Test grounds.
  • Ensure your documents seamlessly match Aadhaar for minimum delays.
documentsRequired:
Documents Required

For Learner's Licence (LL)
  • Aadhaar/Voter ID Card
  • Proof of Birth Certificate
  • Medical declaration form (Form 1)
  • Blood group report (optional but recommended)
For Permanent DL
  • Original WB Learner's Licence printout
  • Form 4 Online Application Print
  • E-Payment Acknowledgment
  • Relevant vehicle ownership/driving school documents
onlineApplication:
How to Apply Online

Part A: The Learner Permit
  1. Execute a visit to sarathi.parivahan.gov.in and pick West Bengal.
  2. Click "Apply for Learner Licence" making sure to select Aadhaar to accelerate clearing procedures.
  3. Submit forms and e-transfer test charges.
  4. Review the video tutorial, wrap up the e-Exam, and print off your valid LL permit immediately.
Part B: Upgrading to Permanent DL
  1. After observing a 30 day gestation period, select "Apply for Driving Licence".
  2. Furnish your freshly acquired LL parameters and process payment via the centralized gateway.
  3. Procure an available Driving Skill Test timeslot for a West Bengal RTO facility.
offlineApplication:
How to Apply Offline / Driving Test

The only mandatory offline event is the practical exam:

  1. Present yourself at the specified RTO. Check in with the front desk examiner using the slip.
  2. Undergo physical document inspection.
  3. Maneuver your legally sound test vehicle across the MVI track strictly adhering to road compliance metrics.
afterApplying: Once Approved: Pass notifications are almost immediate. The smart card takes a processing cue and ships out securely via Speed Post hitting your residence typically beyond 10-14 days.
helpfulLinks: MoRTH Sarathi Portal WB Transport Dept
